text.tspan: Lung cancer death rate in men vs. women, 2022
The reported annual death rate from lung cancer per 100,000 people in men versus women, based on the underlying
Note: To allow for comparisons between countries and over time, the metrics are age-standardized. All deaths in a country may not have
been registered with a cause of death.
